catalogBook.title: Fearless
catalogBook.author: Francine Pascal
catalogBook.authorBio: Francine Pascal is an American author known for her young adult novels, particularly the "Fear Street" series.
catalogBook.whyRead: If you enjoy thrilling and suspenseful horror stories with relatable teenage characters.
catalogBook.summary: A suspenseful story about a group of teenagers facing terrifying situations.

note: This file saves BookCompass and Google Books preview metadata. Preview pages are displayed by Google Books and are not downloaded.
